title: Poongatru Puthithanathu Lyrics Moondram Pirai
stanzas:
Poongaatru pudhithaanathu
pudhu vazhvu sathiraaduthu
irandu uyirai inaithu vilaiyaadum
uyirai inaithu vilaiyaadum.

poovaani ponmegamum
un polae.
naalellaam vilaiyaadum

Poongaatru pudhithaanathu
pudhu vazhvu sathiraaduthu
irandu uyirai inaithu vilaiyaadum
uyirai inaithu vilaiyaadum.

en vazhvil nee vandhathu
vidhiyaanaal
nee endhan uyirandro.

Poongaatru pudhithaanathu
pudhu vazhvu sathiraaduthu
irandu uyirai inaithu vilaiyaadum
uyirai inaithu vilaiyaadum.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses themes of love and the beauty of new beginnings, symbolized through nature.

In which movie does this song appear?

This song is featured in the movie Moondram Pirai.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by the legendary KJ Yesudas.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for this song was composed by Ilaiyaraaja.

When was this song released?

This song was released in 1982.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Poongatru Puthithanathu, the lyrical beauty unfolds as it captures the essence of love blossoming amidst nature's charm. Featured in the film Moondram Pirai, the song conveys a sense of nostalgia and warmth, evoking deep emotions in listeners. The soothing melody, combined with KJ Yesudas's heartfelt rendition, creates a serene atmosphere perfect for romantic moments. This classic piece remains a cherished favorite, resonating with anyone who appreciates timeless love songs.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Poongatru Puthithanathu from Moondram Pirai is a timeless melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voice of KJ Yesudas and the masterful composition by Ilaiyaraaja, this song resonates with anyone who has experienced the magic of romance. Its soothing lyrics and captivating tune make it a must-listen for fans of classic Tamil music.
stanzaMeanings: The new life of the flower breeze is bringing together two lives, playing with them.
The new life of the flower breeze is bringing together
The arriving breeze will become a small child.
The flower girl and the golden cloud are like you. Every day is a play.
The new life of the flower breeze is bringing together two lives, playing with them.
The new life of the flower breeze is bringing together
Where does the river go searching for the sea?
The golden flower will come searching.
You came into my life, and you are my soul.
The new life of the flower breeze is bringing together two lives, playing with them.
The new life of the flower breeze is bringing together
